footer.description: Your reliable partner in the field of auctions and car imports since 2016.

home.title: Prime Cars — Car Import from USA to Armenia | COPART & IAAI
home.description: Prime Cars — your trusted partner for importing vehicles from US auctions to Armenia. Buy cars from COPART and IAAI, sea freight, customs clearance, insurance included.
home.keywords: car import armenia, copart armenia, iaai armenia, buy car from usa, auto auction, vehicle import, Prime Cars, Gyumri cars

cars.title: Cars For Sale — Imported from USA | Prime Cars
cars.description: Browse vehicles already imported to Armenia and cars in transit from US auctions. Toyota, Honda, BMW, Mercedes, Tesla and more. Full specs, photos and pricing.
cars.keywords: cars for sale armenia, imported cars, Toyota Armenia, Tesla, BMW

carDetail.descriptionTemplate: {year} {brand} {model} imported from the USA. Price ${price}. {fuel} · {transmission}. Full specs, photos and import cost calculator on Prime Cars.

calculator.title: Car Import Calculator — USA to Armenia | Prime Cars
calculator.description: Free import cost calculator for vehicles from US auctions: auction fees, ground shipping, sea freight, customs duty. Get an instant estimate for your car.
calculator.keywords: car import calculator, customs calculator armenia, copart cost, import fees

partners.title: Our Partners — COPART, IAAI & More | Prime Cars
partners.description: Prime Cars works with leading auto auction houses and shipping providers to deliver the best prices and service for vehicle imports to Armenia.

apply.title: Apply for Partnership | Prime Cars
apply.description: Register and start importing vehicles from the USA. Our team will help you find, buy and deliver the car you want to Armenia.

hero.title: Your reliable partner in the world of cars
hero.description: Purchasing a car is an important decision, and our goal is to make this process safe, transparent and efficient.

popularDeals.title: Available cars
popularDeals.noCars: No cars available at the moment

ourPartners.title: Our Partners
ourPartners.description: Our commitment to providing first-class services is backed by strong and lasting partnerships with leading shipping companies.

services.description: We offer a full range of services — from participating in U.S. auctions to handing over the keys to your vehicle. At the core of our work is not just car delivery, but building long-term partnerships with our clients.

contract.title: Signing a Cooperation Agreement
contract.description: Official partnership agreement with transparent terms and clearly defined obligations of both parties.

historyCheck.title: Vehicle History Check
historyCheck.description: Before participating in an auction, we verify the history of the selected vehicle using services such as AutoCheck and Carfax.

auctionAccess.title: Access to Auction Accounts
auctionAccess.description: By registering as our partner, you gain access to insurance and dealer-only auctions, as well as the ability to purchase vehicles across multiple platforms.

purchasing.title: Purchasing Vehicles Through Auctions
purchasing.description: You can participate in auctions either by visiting our office or from any location by following live auctions online and purchasing vehicles at your desired price.

groundShipping.title: Ground Shipping to US Ports
groundShipping.description: The car is transported from the auction to the appropriate port, and additional photos of the car are provided upon arrival.

insurance.title: Insurance
insurance.description: Based on port photographs, cargo insurance (Class A) is provided by leading local insurance companies.

seaShipping.title: Sea Shipping
seaShipping.description: Sea freight from the US to a designated country. The vehicle is loaded into a container, and you can track the progress of your vehicle online.

customs.title: Unloading & Customs Clearance
customs.description: In the presence of our specialists, the vehicle is unloaded from the container and undergoes customs clearance through our brokerage organization.

support.title: 24/7 Customer Support
support.description: To optimize processes and improve customer service, we have created a customer support team that acts as a link between us and our partners.

dashboard.title: Personal Online Dashboard
dashboard.description:
Using our technological advantages, we provide dealers with a convenient and personalized online account. In this digital environment, users gain quick access to essential information and can fully control processes, adapting them to their individual needs.
The system includes user-friendly tools for tracking all logistics processes, a smart calculator, and a range of innovative, well-designed features.

extraMedia.title: Extra Photo & Video
extraMedia.description: If necessary, our partners can request additional photos or videos from our warehouses. We provide high-quality services that, in turn, meet the requirements of our partners.

inspection.title: Pre-Purchase Vehicle Inspection
inspection.description: An expert will visit the auction site to take additional photographs and videos, and to obtain additional information.

cover.title: Vehicle Cover Before Delivery
cover.description: Cover your vehicle completely with a tent. Protect your car from rain, dirt and dust.

windowFilm.title: Window Covering with Film
windowFilm.description: If your car is missing windows or a windshield, we will cover them with a film to prevent water, dust and dirt from getting inside.

airFreight.title: Air Freight
airFreight.description: Express vehicle delivery by air freight.

cargoShipping.title: Cargo Shipping
cargoShipping.description: Transportation of cargo of any complexity from the USA by sea and air.

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.intro: Prime Cars is a representative of the largest American auto auctions, such as IAAI, Copart, Manheim, ADESA, and the Auction Pipeline network in Armenia, and has more than 10 years of experience. Our company specializes in international logistics, with a strong focus on transporting vehicles from the USA. We not only manage logistics, but also build a path of trust and reliability for each client.
aboutUs.warehouses: We offer professional vehicle transportation services from the USA and Canada to any destination worldwide. Our warehouses in the US and Canada are located in the following cities: New York, Norfolk, Savannah, Miami, Houston, Los Angeles, Seattle, Toronto, Honolulu, and Anchorage. This infrastructure guarantees safe storage, fast processing, and full control at every stage of transportation.
aboutUs.access: We have access to complete information about auction lots, as well as additional tools for dealers, including access to dealer-only auctions. We have extensive experience in transporting both new and used cars, trucks, motorcycles, ATVs, cargo, motorboats, equipment, and other types of vehicles.
aboutUs.assistance: If you have found a car that interests you, or if you have a personal vehicle in the USA that you would like to transport to Armenia, Prime Cars will assist you every step of the way, ensuring your vehicle arrives safely and on time.
aboutUs.team: The Prime Cars team treats your vehicles as if they were their own. That is why our customers return to us year after year. In every vehicle we deliver, we see not just cargo, but trust — and we strive to justify that trust every day.
aboutUs.advantages: According to our customers, the main advantages of Prime Cars are stability, reliability, safety, and efficient business processes.
aboutUs.dream: If you have found the car of your dreams, trust us with the rest. Enjoy a seamless and professional experience with Prime Cars. Our goal is not only to meet expectations, but to exceed them.
aboutUs.whyDescription: Based on years of experience, we offer effective and transparent solutions at every stage of vehicle transportation. We believe that true quality lies in continuous development, and the success of our partners is our success.
aboutUs.whyBusiness: To support the rapid launch and growth of your business, we provide free access to all Category A auctions, as well as a personal online platform where information, photos, and financial reports for purchased vehicles are available.
aboutUs.whyPrice: Thanks to our direct contracts with major industry partners, we deliver high-quality service at competitive prices. We not only deliver vehicles, but also build long-term, reliable partnerships.
aboutUs.missionDescription: Our mission is simple: to make the car buying process as easy and transparent as possible. We provide professional services for buying, transporting, and delivering vehicles. We support our partners in helping more people acquire their dream cars.
aboutUs.platformDescription: A personal account is provided free of charge for dealers to monitor all logistics processes and financial reports of purchased vehicles.

contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.description: Get in touch with us for any questions.
contactUs.availability: We are always available for you

shipping.title: Global Shipping Network
shipping.description: Thanks to the strategic location of our ports and offices, we can quickly collect your vehicle from anywhere in the USA and Canada. We operate 10 large warehouses across the USA and Canada, each staffed by more than 100 employees, ensuring safe vehicle storage and efficient order processing.
shipping.citiesInformation: We ship from New York, Norfolk, Savannah, Miami, Houston, Los Angeles, Seattle, Honolulu, Anchorage, and Toronto to Armenia, Georgia, Poland, Lithuania, Germany, the Netherlands, the UAE, Oman, and other countries worldwide.

carsPage.title: Premium Vehicle Collection
carsPage.subtitle: Discover our carefully selected inventory of luxury and performance vehicles. Whether you're looking for immediate availability, tracking incoming shipments, or seeking a custom order—we have you covered.

empty.arrivingDescription: Currently no vehicles are being shipped. Browse our available inventory or place a custom order for your dream car.
empty.orderDescription: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact us to discuss sourcing any vehicle from international auctions tailored to your exact specifications.

form.icePowerExceedsElectric: ICE power exceeds the maximum 30-minute power of electric motor
form.loggedInNotice: It is necessary to pay attention to the release or manufacturing date of the vehicle (the moment of release), taking into account that the calculation of customs duties may be carried out according to the rates established for the year preceding the manufacture of the given vehicle.
form.validationError: Please fill in all required fields
form.noticeBody: This calculator provides an estimate based on typical import scenarios. Actual costs may vary depending on specific vehicle details, current exchange rates, and customs regulations. For a precise quote, please contact our team.

results.partnerMessage: To use calculator become a partner.
results.importantNotice: All Transactions with companies and citizens of the Republic of Armenia are made exclusively in Armenian currency (Dram / AMD). Note: customs fees are calculated at the exchange rate set by the Central Bank of Armenia as of the given day.

partners.title: Together we create success
partners.description: Join Prime Cars’ global network and unlock new opportunities in the automotive import industry. We’re looking for strategic partners who share our vision of excellence and innovation.

benefits.title: Why Partner With Prime Cars
benefits.description: Join a network of successful partners and benefit from our expertise, resources, and global reach

growth.title: Growth Opportunities
growth.description: Access to expanding markets and continuous business growth through our established network and proven track record.

trusted.title: Trusted Partnership
trusted.description: Build a long-term relationship based on transparency, reliability, and mutual success in the automotive industry.

global.title: Global Reach
global.description: Leverage our international network spanning 15+ countries and connections with major auction houses worldwide.
